seo.title: Haystack Guardrails for Government
seo.description: Compliance guide for Haystack agents in government. Meet FedRAMP, FISMA requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Government teams using Haystack for LLM pipelines face heightened risks due to stringent regulations like FedRAMP and NIST 800-53, where failures in retrieval accuracy or hallucination can lead to national security breaches or civil liberties violations. Compliance guardrails are essential to ensure explainability, prevent classified data exposure, and enable algorithmic impact assessments. Vex integrates seamlessly as a Haystack component to monitor and enforce these requirements in production.

complianceRequirements.description: Requires continuous monitoring and auditing of cloud-based AI systems handling federal data.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex logs all pipeline executions with metadata for audit trails, flagging type mismatches and silent errors for FedRAMP-compliant reporting.

complianceRequirements.description: Mandates risk management controls including access controls and error handling for information systems.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex enforces input validation and error surfacing, preventing custom component failures from compromising system integrity.

complianceRequirements.description: Requires algorithmic impact assessments and safeguards against bias in AI decisions affecting citizens.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex monitors retriever relevance and generator fidelity, providing metrics for impact assessments and explainability reports.

complianceRequirements.description: Ensures AI outputs are accessible and explainable to all users, including those with disabilities.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex validates output formats and traces decisions back to retrieved context, ensuring appealable and accessible responses.

industryRisks.name: Hallucinated Policy Decisions
industryRisks.description: Generator produces fabricated details beyond retrieved context, leading to incorrect citizen advisories.
industryRisks.example: AI recommends ineligible benefits, violating public trust and triggering investigations.

industryRisks.name: Irrelevant Document Retrieval
industryRisks.description: Retriever surfaces classified or outdated docs, risking data exposure.
industryRisks.example: Secret intelligence docs returned in unclassified query, breaching security clearances.

industryRisks.name: Silent Component Failures
industryRisks.description: Custom components crash without alerts, causing undetected pipeline breakdowns.
industryRisks.example: Error in declassification checker allows sensitive data to external LLM.

industryRisks.name: Type Mismatches in Pipelines
industryRisks.description: Output schema violations propagate errors in multi-step government workflows.
industryRisks.example: Document list passed to generator expecting string, corrupting appeal records.

implementation.title: Add Vex Guardrail Component to Haystack Pipeline
implementation.description: Integrate Vex as a custom node to monitor all pipeline runs and flag compliance violations in real-time.
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components import VexGuardrail

vex_key = "vex://your-government-project"
pipeline = Pipeline()
pipeline.add_component("vex", VexGuardrail(api_key=vex_key, ruleset="gov-fedramp"))
pipeline.connect("retriever", "vex")
pipeline.connect("vex", "generator")
pipeline.draw("gov_pipeline.png")

implementation.title: Monitor Retrieval Relevance for NIST Compliance
implementation.description: Use Vex to score document relevance and block low-confidence retrievals that could expose irrelevant or classified data.
implementation.code:
from vex_sdk import Vex
from haystack.components.retrievers import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever

vex = Vex(api_key="vex://gov-key")
retriever = InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store)

# In custom retriever wrapper
results = retriever.run(query=query, top_k=5)
scores = [vex.score_retrieval_relevance(query, doc.content) for doc in results["documents"]]
if any(s < 0.8 for s in scores):
    raise ValueError("Retrieval failed NIST relevance threshold")

implementation.title: Prevent Hallucinations with Context Fidelity Checks
implementation.description: Enforce generator outputs stay grounded in retrieved context to meet explainability requirements.
implementation.code:
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator
from vex_sdk import Vex

vex = Vex(api_key="vex://gov-key")
generator = OpenAIGenerator(model="gpt-4o")

# In pipeline post-processing
generated = generator.run(prompt=prompt, context=docs)
fidelity = vex.score_generation_fidelity(generated["generation"], [d.content for d in docs])
if fidelity < 0.9:
    raise ValueError("Hallucination detected - violates EO AI explainability")

caseStudyScenario.heading: Haystack in Government: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario: A federal agency deploys a Haystack pipeline for processing citizen inquiries about benefits eligibility, integrating a BM25 retriever with policy documents and GPT-4o generator. The system handles sensitive PII and must comply with FISMA for data protection. During testing, the retriever occasionally returns outdated regulations, and the generator fabricates eligibility criteria not present in retrieved context. Custom components for redaction silently fail, allowing PII leakage. Without monitoring, these issues go undetected until a congressional audit reveals compliance failures, risking contract debarment.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: Integrating Vex as a pipeline component flags 92% of irrelevant retrievals and blocks hallucinated responses exceeding 10% fidelity drift. Real-time alerts surface silent custom component errors, enabling rapid fixes. The agency passes FedRAMP reauthorization with comprehensive audit logs from Vex, demonstrating explainable decisions traceable to source documents. Public trust improves as appeal rates drop 65% due to verifiable AI reasoning.

cta.heading: Comply with Government Regulations Using Vex
cta.description: Integrate Vex into your Haystack pipelines today for FedRAMP-ready compliance monitoring.
